doc_layout.CHANGELOG.md: Project changelog, unreleased section at top
doc_layout.changelog.d/: Changelog fragment directory, one .misc.md file per change
doc_layout.src/robotsix_chat/repo/direct/__init__.p: Direct-repo tool factory (push, PR, direct_fix). Tools are nested async functions inside build_direct_repo_tools(). Entry point: build_direct_repo_tools(settings, component_request=None).
doc_layout.src/robotsix_chat/repo/study/workspace.p: WorkspaceManager class for tarball-based repo study (no git binary). Entry point: build_repo_study_tools(settings, direct_repo_settings). URL-building for tarball downloads at line ~152.
doc_layout.src/robotsix_chat/chat/server/app.py: Starlette ASGI app. _build_static_tools() at line ~582 assembles all tool lists.
doc_layout.docs/periodic-checks.md: User-facing docs for periodic subsessions (monitors). Documents the blocked-resume threshold detection (item 8 under 'How it works under the hood'): 3 consecutive blocked resumes auto-close with repeated_blocked reason.
doc_layout.docs/architecture.md: Architecture docs — subpackage inventory mentions blocked-resume threshold in the subsessions/ row.

conventions.changelog: CHANGELOG.md has unreleased section at top; changes listed as markdown bullets.
conventions.changelog_fragments: Each PR adds a fragment under changelog.d/ with pattern YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ-<description>-<random>.misc.md containing a single-line description.
conventions.error_format: Tool error strings start with 'Error:' or 'Refused:' — no trailing punctuation after 'Refused:' lines.
